title: Amazon Linux 2023 - ALAS2023-2026-1519: Medium priority package update for python-jwt
description:
Package updates are available for Amazon Linux 2023 that fix the following vulnerabilities:
CVE-2026-32597:
	A missing verification step has been discovered in PyJWT. PyJWT does not validate the crit (Critical) Header Parameter defined in RFC 7515 SS4.1.11. When a JWS token contains a crit array listing extensions that PyJWT does not understand, the library accepts the token instead of rejecting it. This violates the MUST requirement in the RFC.
